_meta.postcode_source: Reconciled: GeoNames BE postal place-name match (authoritative for main postcodes) overlaid with OpenDataSoft georef-belgium-postal-codes for sub-localities; cross-validated. 565/565 communes covered.
_meta.note: Public reference data — shipped in-plugin for the onboarding commune picker. Regenerate the form datalist via scripts/build_form_communes.py.
